scripts.check: npm run check:workspace && npm run check:repo
scripts.check:workspace: npm run check:self --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/contracts && npm run check:self --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/runtime-core && npm run check:self --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/control-plane-core && npm run check:self --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/openclaw-adapter && npm run check:self --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/control-plane-shell && npm run check:self --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/openclaw-plugin && npm run check:self --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/control-plane
scripts.build:workspace: npm run build:self --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/contracts && npm run build:self --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/runtime-core && npm run build:self --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/control-plane-core && npm run build:self --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/openclaw-adapter && npm run build:self --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/control-plane-shell && npm run build:self --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/openclaw-plugin && npm run build:self --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/control-plane
scripts.test: npm run test:packages && npm run test:apps && npm run test:smoke:root && npm run test:evaluation
scripts.test:packages: npm run build:workspace && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/run-test-group.mjs package:contracts package:runtime-core package:control-plane-core package:openclaw-adapter package:control-plane-shell
scripts.test:package:contracts: npm run build:workspace && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/run-test-group.mjs package:contracts
scripts.test:package:runtime-core: npm run build:workspace && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/run-test-group.mjs package:runtime-core
scripts.test:package:control-plane-core: npm run build:workspace && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/run-test-group.mjs package:control-plane-core
scripts.test:package:openclaw-adapter: npm run build:workspace && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/run-test-group.mjs package:openclaw-adapter
scripts.test:package:control-plane-shell: npm run build:workspace && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/run-test-group.mjs package:control-plane-shell
scripts.test:apps: npm run build:workspace && node ./scripts/clean-dist.mjs ./dist-smoke && tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir dist-smoke && node ./scripts/run-test-group.mjs app:openclaw-plugin app:control-plane --compiled-dir dist-smoke
scripts.test:app:openclaw-plugin: npm run build:workspace && node ./scripts/clean-dist.mjs ./dist-smoke && tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir dist-smoke && node ./scripts/run-test-group.mjs app:openclaw-plugin --compiled-dir dist-smoke
scripts.test:app:control-plane: npm run build:workspace && node ./scripts/clean-dist.mjs ./dist-smoke && tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir dist-smoke && node ./scripts/run-test-group.mjs app:control-plane --compiled-dir dist-smoke
scripts.test:context-processing: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --test --test-concurrency=1 dist/tests/context-processing-contracts.test.js dist/tests/context-processing-pipeline.test.js dist/tests/utterance-parser.test.js dist/tests/concept-normalizer.test.js dist/tests/noise-policy.test.js dist/tests/summary-planner.test.js dist/tests/context-processing-experience.test.js dist/tests/context-processing-harness.test.js dist/tests/semantic-spans.test.js
scripts.test:smoke:root: npm run build:workspace && npm run pack:workspace && node ./scripts/clean-dist.mjs ./dist-smoke && tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir dist-smoke && node ./scripts/run-test-group.mjs smoke:root --compiled-dir dist-smoke
